production.playableLoop: Steer a small airship between floating islands, collect four beacon sparks, avoid drifting storm clouds, and deliver the charge to the lighthouse before the timer expires.
production.objective: Collect all four beacon sparks and reach the lighthouse island without touching storm clouds.
production.progression: Storm clouds drift on crossing sine paths and speed up once at least two sparks are carried.
production.failRetry: Storm collision or expired timer switches to failed state; Space resets airship, sparks, timer, and HUD.
feedbackMoments: HUD count increments when a beacon spark is collected.
Airship lantern and sparks bob continuously.
Storm clouds drift as readable moving hazards.
Win and fail messages prompt Space retry.

assetPlan.playerHero: Custom procedural player hero airship assembled from hull, balloon, gondola, fins, mast, and lamp pieces.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Custom procedural obstacle-enemy storm clouds built from clustered puffs with drifting hazard paths.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: Custom procedural reward-interactable beacon sparks with emissive-like gold material and bobbing motion.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Custom world environment floating islands, lighthouse, bridges, cloud bank, beacon posts, and sky lighting.
assetPlan.uiHud: Structured HUD text plus retained loading, pause, settings, fail-retry, win-milestone, and touch-controls states.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Starter goal-ping asset retained for future collect/win hooks; current proof uses visual and HUD feedback.

assetSourcing: tn asset source search --game-category space --format glb --direct-only --json returned 20 direct CC-BY Objaverse robots/ships, including objaverse-000457eecbd4428c92fdedd1465674cf-glb, objaverse-0061ab9bcd3942ad81be2c6e06f94415-glb, and objaverse-00aad89c14fb4906bad24f58587b81aa-glb, but they do not form a cohesive sky-island lighthouse kit.
tn asset source search --game-category environment --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category collectible --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
Fallback: cohesive procedural/custom primitive mesh kit authored in content source.

ownsState: Transform positions for airship parts, sparks, and storm clouds

proofCommands: tn game qa --project . --run-proof --url <preview-url> --entity player --press KeyD --expect-axis x --json
